---
title: "otherReadStyleMethodsDTU"
author: "caitlinpage"
date: "2026-04-15"
output: workflowr::wflow_html
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

## Introduction

```{r}
library(annotatr)
library(data.table)
library(plyranges)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(edgeR)
```

```{r}
seqs <- seqnames(BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38::BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38)[1:22]

cg_sites <- lapply(seqs, function(x) {
        cbind(data.frame(Biostrings::matchPattern("CG", BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38::BSgenome.Hsapiens.UCSC.hg38[[x]])),
            seqnames = x
        )}) %>% bind_rows()
```


```{r}
dtu.gene <- readRDS("/researchers/caitlin.page/cf_nano/r_output/ts.gene.gene.rds")
```

```{r}
cbind(dtu.gene, annotations_genes %>% filter(symbol %in% dtu.gene$gene_id) %>%
  group_by(symbol, seqnames) %>%
  summarise(start = min(start), end = max(end)) %>% ungroup() %>% .[match(dtu.gene$gene_id, .$symbol),] %>% .[,2:4])
```
